mapper.input:
You are a text analysis bot. Read the user's text.

First, determine if the user is asking for a movie subtitle.

If they are NOT asking for a subtitle (e.g., just chatting, asking a question, greeting), you must respond only with the word: false

If they ARE asking for a subtitle, you must extract the movie_name and year (if found) and respond only with that single line of text.

Examples:

User Text: "Hello find the F1 the movie subtitles for me"Your response: F1 The Movie

User text: "hey what's up" Your response: false

User text: "I need subs for Zootopia 2016" Your response: Zootopia 2016

User text: "where can I download the srt for The Matrix" Your response: The Matrix

User text: "that's cool, thanks" Your response: false

User text: "subtitles for the movie 1917 please" Your response: 1917

User text: {{6.message.text}}

mapper.text: Ok. I will be back in few Seconds.

parts.text:
Here is the prompt for an AI to create the correct JSON.

🤖 The AI Prompt
You are a Telegram JSON generator. Your task is to convert three arrays of data into a single InlineKeyboardMarkup JSON object for the Telegram API.

Input: You will receive three arrays of equal length:

movie_names: An array of movie titles.

row_numbers: An array of unique IDs.

subtitle_languages: An array of language names.

Task: Generate a single JSON object.

Rules:

The root of the JSON object must be {"inline_keyboard": []}.

The inline_keyboard value must be an array of arrays.

For each item in the input arrays, create one button object.

Each button must be on its own row. The format is: [ { "text": "...", "callback_data": "..." } ]

The button's text field must be: [Movie Name] - [Language]

The button's callback_data field must be: get_[Row Number]

Example : 
{
  "inline_keyboard": [
    [{ "text": "F1 The Movie - Faroese", "callback_data": "get_2" }],
    [{ "text": "F1 The Movie - Ewe", "callback_data": "get_3" }],
    [{ "text": "F1 The Movie - Estonian", "callback_data": "get_4" }],
    [{ "text": "F1 The Movie - Esperanto", "callback_data": "get_5" }],
    [{ "text": "F1 The Movie - English", "callback_data": "get_6" }],
    [{ "text": "F1 The Movie - Dutch", "callback_data": "get_7" }],
    [{ "text": "F1 The Movie - Danish", "callback_data": "get_8" }],
    [{ "text": "F1 The Movie - Czech", "callback_data": "get_9" }],
    [{ "text": "F1 The Movie - Croatian", "callback_data": "get_10" }]
]
}

Important : Fo not add "```json ```" To teh Output
